title: AI Wealt OS: Finance, Budget, Excel | Product Hunt
excerpt: 8-Chapter Strategic Roadmap: From conducting your first Financial Clarity Audit to executing a 12-Month Wealth Acceleration Plan, this e-book provides the system you need to eliminate debt and grow your net worth, 50 Ready-to-Use AI Prompts: No prompt engineering required. Simply copy and paste these prompts into ChatGPT or Claude to get instant analysis on your budget, investment allocation, tax deductions, and debt-payoff strategies.
